reason: Response B ("Push hard enough and you will discover exactly which corners cut back") is a compressed, witty subversion that plays on the idiom "cutting corners" with a darker, more sophisticated twist—the kind of economical wordplay and ironic inversion that reflects Opus-tier craft. Response A is amusing but longer, more explanatory, and relies on a familiar relatable joke (procrastination/cat videos), which reads more like the safe, accessible humor of a smaller model. The brevity and conceptual cleverness of B point to Opus.
